name: Komron Dadamukhamedov
message: I really liked the speed of these things.

name: Bekzod Karimov
message: Switched our startup from a US provider and the latency difference in Tashkent is night and day. Support actually answers in Russian too.

name: Priya Nair
message: Great value for managed databases. Would love a Mumbai region next, but the Singapore one is already fast enough for us.

name: Otabek Yusupov
message: The migration team moved our entire platform over a weekend with zero downtime. Genuinely impressed with the engineering.
